data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an additional security layer via two-factor authentication.
data.technical_spec: Optional feature requiring a PIN along with the standard login credentials.

data.title: Security Patches and Updates
data.description: Regular updates to address vulnerabilities and improve security.
data.technical_spec: Patches for server-side and client-side components are released frequently.

data.title: Anti-Spam Algorithms
data.description: Implements algorithms to detect and mitigate spam and abuse.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning to identify suspicious patterns in messaging.

data.title: Encrypted Backup Options
data.description: Support for encrypted backups of chat histories.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encrypted backups are available via cloud services.

data.title: User Report Mechanism
data.description: Users can report spam or abusive content directly within the app.
data.technical_spec: In-app mechanism for reporting with an optional forwarding of recent message history to the support team.
